description: Cross-language RFC 8785 JCS fingerprint anchor for SpecGap spec ingress.

ingress.title: Network-isolated analysis sandbox
ingress.stakeholder_intent: The sandbox must have no network access. Code running inside it cannot reach the internet or any host.
ingress.formalized_policy: Network egress is restricted: localhost connections are allowed for the local metrics collector.
ingress.implementation_claim: The runtime blocks all external network destinations; only loopback (localhost) traffic is permitted.
